title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial on installing and using Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications without paid APIs. Covers setup on Windows, LLM selection including Qwen 3.5, and demonstrates building a complete travel agency AI app with multiple agents and Flask UI.
